title: Neosyn's Watering Can
description: A Watering Can for your Crops
body:
# Neosyn's Watering Can![title](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/ea7f8f35f9672803453d73e7c33a7a46dbfb9d3d.png)

## A Bonemeal like Tool, nice for begin/mid game 

Recipe:
 
 ![Recipe of water can](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/ec4269a1e524400b6e8e83333e3b3f3f74b90342.png)
### 
###   Use: When right clicking a crop, **not a sapling!** It acts like bonemeal. 55 uses and a 3 second cooldown
![Use](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/3ac5ba0e776b5779515984f4df9fff8444be36df.gif)


Languages: US,
[ Resource pack used in promo: MandalasGUI ]
